creator: petef@databits.net
text:
++ 30/08/01 22:10 -0700 - John Merryweather Cooper:
|  Ah, we're getting somewhere.  If pspell-0.12.2 put it's header files in 
|  /usr/local/include/pspell, then aspell needs to be told where they are. 
|   Your build is only looking for it in /usr/local/include . . .

FWIW, I just built aspell with no problems.

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
